title: Pacaltsdorp United thrashes George
description: CRICKET NEWS - A hat-trick by Matthew Thorne...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - A hat-trick by Matthew Thorne (5/19) was the highlight in the only SWD Premier League match that was played last weekend.


> George was dismissed for a record low score of 90, whereafter Pacaltsdorp only needed 7.3 overs to surpass the target for a nine-wicket victory.


Duren Felix (4/20) was equally impressive with the ball.

Pacaltsdorp United has now moved to the second position on the log.

The scorecard:

Pacaltsdorp United beats George by nine wickets:

George 40 all out (12.5 overs) (Matthew Thorne 5/19, Duren Felix 4/20).

Pacaltsdorp United 44/1 (7.3 overs) (Kurt Botha 21*, Anoxolo Kitshini 19).

The log positions are:

1st: Sussex - 34 points (9 matches)

2nd: Pacaltsdorp United - 32 points (8 matches)

3rd: Knysna Cavaliers - 26 points (9 matches)

4th: Union Stars I - 20 points (9 matches)

5th: Harlequins Forces - 15 points (7 matches)

6th: George - 13 points (9 matches)

7th: Union Stars II - 12 points (9 matches)

8th: New Dawn Park - 6 points (8 matches).

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
